figures.caption: Figure 3: (a) Naive reconstruction requires materializing and writing back full Kh to VRAM (global GPU memory), leading to excessive memory usage and I/O. (b) Our fused kernel consumes CKh and CV h tiles on-chip with flash decoding, reducing both peak memory footprint and I/O traffic. All the step numbers are shown in circle.
